recommendations.title: Police Story: Lockdown
recommendations.overview: A man looking for the release of a long-time prisoner takes a police officer, his daughter, and a group of strangers hostage.

recommendations.title: Railroad Tigers
recommendations.overview: A railroad worker in China in 1941 leads a team of freedom fighters against the Japanese in order to get food for the poor.

recommendations.title: Little Big Soldier

recommendations.title: L.A. Confidential
recommendations.overview: Three detectives in the corrupt and brutal L.A. police force of the 1950s use differing methods to uncover a conspiracy behind the shotgun slayings of the patrons at an all-night diner.

recommendations.title: The Guilty

recommendations.title: A Sun
recommendations.overview: A family of four fractures under the weight of unmet expectations, unexpected tragedy, and uncompromising pride.

recommendations.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want 2: Masterclass
recommendations.overview: Pietro Zinni is asked by the police to revive the old gang to create a task force that will stop the spread of smart drugs.

recommendations.title: The Protector

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: 36th Precinct
